extractor_notes: First baseline; framework didn't exist yet. Numbers cross-checked against the test log + FINAL-DEBRIEF narrative the user shared. Future runs use extract-run.sh.

_original_baseline_uncorrected._note: Pre-correction values, preserved for audit transparency. See notes.md 'Post-hoc correction (2026-05-22 v2.8.3 investigation)' for the reasoning.

deviations.description: Docker absent on host machine; pivoted to local Postgres via homebrew (PG 17.9 + pgvector 0.8.2)
LLM provider pivoted Anthropic→OpenAI mid-run per user direction; @anthropic-ai/sdk never installed; openai@6.39.0 used instead
pdf-parse/pdfjs-dist incompatible with Next.js webpack-RSC AND tsx; only plain Node ESM works (root cause: Promise.all([getText, getInfo]) breaks pdfjs worker-transfer; sequential works)
No pre-run snapshot of agent-identities.json taken; baseline reputation state was whatever was live at run-start. Some identities had prior tier states from earlier session work.
Spawn ceremony was bypassed for 83% of actor spawns (Agent tool used directly instead of formal HETS flow). Cascaded into 0% contract-verifier exercise rate.

Chaos-actor temporal-blindness false positive: both blair + lior read prompt-enrich-trigger.log entries from PRE-/plugin-update and concluded 'prompt-enrich Fix-2(a) broken in runtime'. Post-update entries (May 21 21:24 onwards) actually show vague:false correctly. Source/cache binary diff is empty. Corrected post-hoc 2026-05-22; see notes.md for full investigation. Implication: convergence between two actors with shared methodological blindspot is NOT a strong validation signal.

findings_breakdown_by_severity._note: Corrected post-hoc 2026-05-22: original critical=1 was the prompt-enrich runtime-gap finding (CHAOS-SUB-1), disproved by temporal-filtered log analysis. See notes.md 'Post-hoc correction' section.

tier_transitions_detail.notes: Crossed all 3 thresholds (unproven→low→med→high) by end of Phase 2
Crossed all 3 thresholds by end of Phase 3

scorecard_7_feature._note: prompt_enrich_fix_2a corrected post-hoc 2026-05-22: original BROKEN-IN-RUNTIME was a false-positive convergence error (see notes.md).

v2.8.3_urgent: CLOSED-AS-FALSE-POSITIVE: prompt-enrich-trigger runtime gap (was the original #1; see deviations[] and notes.md)
Make HETS contract-verifier non-optional in /build-team flow (cascaded from spawn-ceremony bypass)
NEW: chaos-actor prompt template needs temporal-filtering discipline (log entries must filter to >= most-recent /plugin update timestamp for 'current behavior' claims)
NEW: convergence-validation pattern refinement (diverse-method convergence is the strong signal; same-method is just input-processed-twice)
PRODUCT-LEVEL (not toolkit): fix SSRF in /api/ingest of the Textbook→Tutorial project (kai's finding; ships in the project repo, not the toolkit)
v2_9_0_substantive: Update kb-citation-gate error message to surface kb: format requirement
Update architect persona contract to grant Write capability
